author: SantiMod
content:
Atlassians! Tomorrow we will be hosting “Who Wants to be an Atlassianaire” competition, Edition #2!   
 You will be competing for one Discovery of Iris poster and Discord XP, which will then be exchangeable for higher chances of Early Access and other cool benefits… 
  The competition will take place tomorrow (Thursday) at 10pm UTC on the ⁠unknown  channel. If you want to register as a competitor, react to this message with " ".
 You can find the rules of the competition on the aforementioned channel

Disclaimer: winning this competition does not automatically grant you Early Access. This will be achieved by being active in the community channels and helping other fellow Atlassians. (Discord XP is earned this way, winning this competition is a BIG boost for your discord XP)
